arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling ready to play crucial Arsenal role after 'exceptional' training impact
arts.sum: Arsenal are about to embarked on a gruelling autumn schedule which will reveal much about their stomach for sustained title and Champions League challenges

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca admits he's aiming for Liverpool as Chelsea boss seeks return to old rivalry
arts.sum: But Blues boss warns his side are not yet "close" to being title contenders before Sunday's visit to Anfield

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Trent Alexander-Arnold contract vow amid fresh Real Madrid transfer links
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot is not worried about Trent Alexander-Arnold's focus after speculation this week emerged from Spain that Real Madrid are ready to make a move for the defender

arts.ttl: Arne Slot speaks out on Real Madrid interest in Trent Alexander-Arnold and Liverpool contracts
arts.sum: Arne Slot addresses Real Madrid interest in Trent Alexander-Arnold and the Liverpool contract situations of Virgil van Dijk and Mohamed Salah

arts.ttl: Chelsea cannot rely on Cole Palmer to solve all problems – Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea sit fourth in the league and Palmer has been key to their fine start.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot confident uncertainty over future of key Liverpool trio will not prove a distraction
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold, Virgil van Dijk and Mohamed Salah are all out of contract at the end of this campaign

arts.ttl: Max Verstappen gives his verdict on former Liverpool boss Jurgen Klopp's decision to join Red Bull as head of global soccer
arts.sum: Max Verstappen has revealed what he thinks about Jurgen Klopp's appointment by Red Bull. Klopp was named as Red Bull's global head of soccer earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca makes Reece James fitness admission ahead of injury return
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca has confessed Reece James is not able to play more than one match per week as the Blues look to bring an end to his lengthy battle with injuries . Blues fans are keen to see James get back to his best but Maresca pleaded for patience as Chelsea's medical staff manage his return to the pitch.

arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool star is told he must LEAVE new club after 'refusing to board team bus when he found out he wasn't playing crucial match'
arts.sum: The star has been punished after he refused to board the team bus ahead of a key game when he found out that he wasn't named in the starting lineup.

arts.ttl: I am a former Chelsea star and came close to playing for Rangers AND Celtic - but here's why it didn't happen
arts.sum: The hitman also bagged caps at the top level for the Netherlands during his career - that could have included time in Scotland
